name: AgentHiFive Vault
description: Vault-managed credentials, brokered API proxy, and native channel-plugin integration for AI agents

mode.description: Authentication mode: 'bearer' for opaque token, 'agent' for ES256 JWT

privateKey.description: ES256 private key as base64-encoded JWK (only for mode=agent)

tokenAudience.description: Token audience override (optional, defaults to baseUrl)

pollTimeoutMs.description: Approval polling timeout in milliseconds (default: 300000 = 5 min)

connectedProviders.description: List of connected provider names for prompt injection (e.g., ['google', 'microsoft', 'notion'])
